capabilities.name: Full-text search
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: search_tickets("login error") live via MCP gateway → ranked FTS hit (websearch syntax + ILIKE/tag fallback; GIN idx_tickets_fts). UI: TicketsPage debounced search input wired to the same RPC (Lovable commit db8c1ad9).
capabilities.notes: search_tickets RPC + skill added 2026-07-07 (20260707120000 migration + tickets-module.ts).

capabilities.name: Configurable stage pipeline
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 verified 2026-06-11: TicketsKanban reads pipeline_stages (Lovable S3), sync trigger live.

capabilities.name: Escalation rules
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. Table ticket_escalation_rules + run_ticket_escalations() SECURITY DEFINER (service_role escape) applies condition (age > X hrs, status/priority/unassigned filters) and raise-priority/reassign/notify actions. UI: Escalation tab on /admin/tickets with builder + Run sweep now.

capabilities.name: Canned responses
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: manage_canned_response create live via MCP gateway (id 7b5f10ca, rpc:manage_canned_response — SECURITY DEFINER w/ service_role escape). UI: CannedResponsesDialog management + Canned picker in TicketDetailDrawer reply box incl. usage_count tracking (commit db8c1ad9).
capabilities.notes: canned_responses table + RLS + RPC added 2026-07-07 (20260707120000 migration).

capabilities.name: Time tracking per ticket
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. Table ticket_time_entries (minutes, note, billable, started_at) + TicketTimeEntriesPanel in TicketDetailDrawer: Start/Stop timer, manual entry, billable toggle, per-ticket total incl. billable subtotal.

capabilities.name: Custom tags
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Schema: tickets.tags text[] + GIN index live on dev. Skill: manage_ticket update accepts tags[]; search_tickets matches tags. UI: tag filter chips on TicketsPage, Tags column in TicketsTable, add/remove editor in TicketDetailDrawer (commit db8c1ad9).

capabilities.name: Queue/team assignment
capabilities.verify: DONE 2026-07-08. Tables ticket_teams + ticket_team_members; tickets.team_id FK. UI: Teams tab on /admin/tickets to create teams + add members; TicketDetailDrawer team selector routes a ticket to a queue.
